temporal_description:
(00:00-00:01) A woman with dark hair, wearing a blue hoodie, screams in terror. Her hand is pressed against her face as she recoils in fear. She is standing in a dilapidated room with peeling white paint on the walls and a torn shower curtain hanging nearby. (Storyline: The scene opens on a moment of intense fear, establishing a tense and dangerous situation. The woman is clearly in distress.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Terrified, high-pitched scream. 2) Background sounds or music: A loud, crashing sound effect accompanies the scream.)
(00:02-00:07) A man wearing glasses and a plaid shirt violently breaks through a doorway with a wooden plank. He screams with effort and aggression as he forces his way into the room, his face contorted in a snarl. (Storyline: This segment introduces a new, aggressive character who is violently invading the space, escalating the conflict and confirming the woman's fear is justified.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Aggressive, strained scream. 2) Background sounds or music: Loud sounds of wood splintering and crashing.)
